firmware.title: Tcard_X6815D-H777BC-T-GL-230714V199
firmware.description:
Caution! This update may crash rooted devices.
Please plug in charger to OTA upgrade when power is lower than 50%.
Update Version: X6815D-H777BC-T-GL-230714V199
Optimized Issues:
1.Upgraded the Android version from Android 12 to Android 13.
2.Upgraded the XOS version from XOS12.0.0 to XOS13.0.0.
3.Upgraded and added some special features to improve the overall experience, including but not limited to Mobile Cloner, Lightning Multi-Window, Multiple Users, PC Connection, Folax, and Smart Panel.
Reminding:
1.Optimized system stability and performance while fixing other issues.
Visit XClub forum (Geekbar) for more information.
